title: `$ungetc`lvalue cast should give error
body:
Tested using Git head.

While the standard is not exact here, the first argument for `$ungetc` is a character and should be 8-bit wide and should not expect a 32-bit value.
This is the reported error:
```
%Warning-WIDTH: ../../hdl/tbn/uart/uart_model.sv:123:13: Operator FUNGETC expects 32 bits on the $fungetc character, but $fungetc character's VARREF 'c_rx' generates 8 bits.
                                                       : ... In instance uart_model_tb.uart
  123 |     fs_tx = $ungetc(c_rx, fp_rx);
      |             ^~~~~~~
                ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/WIDTH?v=5.001
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
make: *** [Makefile:126: compile] Error 1
```
code_blocks:
%Warning-WIDTH: ../../hdl/tbn/uart/uart_model.sv:123:13: Operator FUNGETC expects 32 bits on the $fungetc character, but $fungetc character's VARREF 'c_rx' generates 8 bits.
                                                       : ... In instance uart_model_tb.uart
  123 |     fs_tx = $ungetc(c_rx, fp_rx);
      |             ^~~~~~~
                ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/WIDTH?v=5.001
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
make: *** [Makefile:126: compile] Error 1
